agent_analysis.hypothesis_rationale: Paying professional fundraising fees directly helps secure larger contributions as professional campaigns are more effective at targeting donors.
agent_analysis.prior_art_notes: Thornton (2006) discusses the returns to professional fundraising inputs.
agent_analysis.interpretation: A highly statistically significant positive correlation was found. Nonprofits spending more on professional fundraising fees receive 18.6-fold returns in total contributions, indicating that contracting professional fundraisers is an effective mechanism for expanding philanthropic capital.
